events.text: Q1 2026: revenue $158M (within guide, but down y/y); a BIS export-license change removed ~$8M of LSA revenue from a Chinese customer; non-GAAP GM ~36%, non-GAAP EPS $0.14 (GAAP near-breakeven). China collapsed to $20M / 13% of sales (-72% y/y). Q2 guide: revenue $170-190M, GM 38-40%, EPS $0.20-0.32; FY26 reaffirmed $740-800M (+11-16% y/y). Swing factor: >$250M of MOCVD+wet+IBD orders for indium-phosphide laser manufacturing (silicon photonics), shipping from Q3'26 with Spectre IBD ~10x capacity by early 2027.
Buy reiterated — 2027E upside in silicon photonics (briefing mention).

events.src: JPM Special Situations · Deal Survey of the Americas
events.text: Tracks the all-stock Veeco / Axcelis merger (merger-arb setup / ACLS proxy). Each VECO share converts into 0.3575 Axcelis shares; the last pending approval is China SAMR antitrust, close expected H2 2026.
Names Veeco among the "upstream tool suppliers (Aixtron, Veeco, Riber)" levered to the compound-semi/optics build.
